user_system_path: Fire the grounded workday-presence guardian on the one scheduled cron. The grounded path (insertTriggerReceipt -> action_source='workday_presence_trigger', evidence from the real lapsing commitment) works but has fired 0 times in prod because nothing scheduled invokes it; morning-pipeline (the only Vercel cron) runs the legacy brief pipeline. Wire the existing owner-targeted /api/cron/workday-presence-trigger-runner in as a 4th morning-pipeline stage so the guardian fires one grounded intervention/day against the owner's real lapsing commitment (owner has 26 active lapsing commitments). No new detector, no new brain.
allowed_files_raw: only the morning-pipeline cron route + its test + control-plane files. The trigger-runner, commitment-bridge, and receipt writer already exist and work — do not modify them; just invoke the existing owner cron route as a 4th stage.
forbidden_files_raw: No lib changes (the guardian path already works), no Slack/Stripe/auth route changes, no schema, no deps.
required_local_proof: npm run build && npm run lint && npx vitest run app/api/cron/morning-pipeline/__tests__/route.test.ts && npm run gate:continuity
required_browser_proof: Runtime: invoking the morning-pipeline cron produces a tkg_actions row with action_source='workday_presence_trigger' and non-empty evidence (a real lapsing commitment) for the owner.
browser_proof_command: trigger /api/cron/morning-pipeline (or the workday-presence-trigger-runner stage) for the owner; observe the grounded receipt + owner Slack ping
acceptance_condition: morning-pipeline invokes the workday-presence trigger-runner as a 4th stage; the guardian fires one grounded intervention for the owner's real lapsing commitment, proven by a workday_presence_trigger receipt with non-empty evidence. Stays quiet safely if no state / no lapsing commitment.
anti_regression_checks: morning-pipeline still runs nightly-ops -> daily-brief -> daily-maintenance unchanged
the new stage uses owner-only FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID gating; no new outbound surface beyond the proven owner Slack loop
runner stays quiet with no saved state or no lapsing commitment
build, lint, morning-pipeline test, gate:continuity green
stop_condition: Stop when morning-pipeline fires the grounded guardian and a workday_presence_trigger receipt with real evidence is proven (or the exact remaining owner-side blocker — e.g. no saved state — is named with a receipt).
next_command: Wire the workday-presence-trigger-runner route as a 4th stage in app/api/cron/morning-pipeline/route.ts; update its test; prove a grounded receipt fires for the owner.
